title: rondeletia convoluta
intro: Rondeletia convoluta, also known as the curled rondeletia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, coughs, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Rondeletia convoluta include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion. In herbal preparations, Rondeletia convoluta is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also dried and used in traditional medicine to make capsules and powders.
